trans-unit.source: Approval of an Imprest Memo is requested.
trans-unit.target: L'approbation d'un document vente est exigée.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType ImpMemoSendForApprovalEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: An approval request for an Imprest Memo has been canceled.
trans-unit.target: Une demande d'approbation de document vente est annulée.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType ImpMemoApprReqCancelledEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: An Imprest Memo has been released.
trans-unit.target: Un document de vente est libéré.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType ImpMemoReleasedEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: Approval of a payment is requested.
trans-unit.target: L'approbation d'un document vente est exigée.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType PaymentsSendForApprovalEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: An approval request for a payment has been canceled.
trans-unit.target: Une demande d'approbation de document vente est annulée.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType PaymentsApprReqCancelledEventDescTxt

trans-unit.target: Un document de vente est libéré.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType PaymentsReleasedEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: Approval of a Payroll Period is requested.
trans-unit.target: L'approbation d'un document vente est exigée.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType PayPeriodSendForApprovalEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: An approval request for a Payroll Period has been canceled.
trans-unit.target: Une demande d'approbation de document vente est annulée.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType PayPeriodApprReqCancelledEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: A Payroll Period has been released.
trans-unit.target: Un document de vente est libéré.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType PayPeriodReleasedEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: Approval of a Leave Application is requested.
trans-unit.target: L'approbation d'un document vente est exigée.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType LeaveAppSendForApprovalEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: An approval request for a Leave Application has been canceled.
trans-unit.target: Une demande d'approbation de document vente est annulée.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType LeaveAppApprReqCancelledEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: A Leave Application has been released.
trans-unit.target: Un document de vente est libéré.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType LeaveAppReleasedEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: There is nothing to release for Imprest Memo %1.
trans-unit.target: Il n'y a rien à libérer pour le document de type %1 portant le numéro %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Imprest Memo - NamedType Text001

trans-unit.source: This document can only be released when the approval process is complete.
trans-unit.target: Ce document ne peut être lancé qu'à la fin du processus d'approbation.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Imprest Memo - NamedType Text002

trans-unit.source: The approval process must be canceled or completed to reopen this document.
trans-unit.target: On doit annuler ou terminer le processus d'approbation avant de rouvrir ce document.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Imprest Memo - NamedType Text003

trans-unit.source: There are unposted prepayment amounts on the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.target: Il existe des montants paiement anticipé non validés sur le document de type %1 portant le numéro %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Imprest Memo - NamedType Text004

trans-unit.source: There are unpaid prepayment invoices that are related to the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.target: Il existe des factures de paiement anticipé impayées liées au document de type %1 portant le numéro %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Imprest Memo - NamedType Text005

trans-unit.source: There is nothing to release for Payment %1.
trans-unit.target: Il n'y a rien à libérer pour le document de type %1 portant le numéro %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Payments - NamedType Text001

trans-unit.source: This document can only be released when the approval process is complete.
trans-unit.target: Ce document ne peut être lancé qu'à la fin du processus d'approbation.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Payments - NamedType Text002

trans-unit.source: The approval process must be canceled or completed to reopen this document.
trans-unit.target: On doit annuler ou terminer le processus d'approbation avant de rouvrir ce document.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Payments - NamedType Text003

trans-unit.source: There are unposted prepayment amounts on the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.target: Il existe des montants paiement anticipé non validés sur le document de type %1 portant le numéro %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Payments - NamedType Text004

trans-unit.source: There are unpaid prepayment invoices that are related to the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.target: Il existe des factures de paiement anticipé impayées liées au document de type %1 portant le numéro %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Payments - NamedType Text005

trans-unit.source: There is nothing to release for Payroll Period %1.
trans-unit.target: Il n'y a rien à libérer pour le document de type %1 portant le numéro %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Release Payroll period - NamedType Text001

trans-unit.source: This Period can only be released when the approval process is complete.
trans-unit.target: Ce document ne peut être lancé qu'à la fin du processus d'approbation.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Release Payroll period - NamedType Text002

trans-unit.source: The approval process must be canceled or completed to reopen this period.
trans-unit.target: On doit annuler ou terminer le processus d'approbation avant de rouvrir ce document.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Release Payroll period - NamedType Text003

trans-unit.source: There are unposted prepayment amounts on the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.target: Il existe des montants paiement anticipé non validés sur le document de type %1 portant le numéro %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Release Payroll period - NamedType Text004

trans-unit.source: There are unpaid prepayment invoices that are related to the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.target: Il existe des factures de paiement anticipé impayées liées au document de type %1 portant le numéro %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Release Payroll period - NamedType Text005
